Responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile with consistent usability.

backend.title: Back-end Development

modalItems: Stable, well-structured RESTful API development built for long-term evolution.
Data modeling and integration with relational and non-relational databases based on project needs.
Secure authentication, authorization, and route protection using best practices.
Performance optimization to reduce infrastructure costs and improve reliability.

Technical architecture designed for maintainability, scalability, and faster delivery.

Deployment, monitoring, and continuous maintenance to keep products stable and competitive.

testimonials.title: What they say
testimonials.subtitle: About me?
testimonials.description: Real outcomes from clients who trusted my work
testimonials.text1: I hired Yago to build our landing page and was impressed by his speed, organization, and quality. The final result strengthened our digital presence and gave our team more confidence to sell.
testimonials.text2: Excellent service from start to finish. Yago translated my requirements into a practical and professional solution, with clear communication throughout the project. Highly recommended.
testimonials.text3: Yago quickly understood our business goals and delivered a technical solution with strategic thinking. The project improved our lead generation process and strengthened our brand positioning.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: I turn ideas into digital products that drive real results
about.description: I'm a Full Stack developer helping companies and professionals build modern, scalable digital experiences focused on conversion.
highlights: Performance, conversion, and user experience as product priorities.
Clean, scalable architecture designed for long-term growth.
Clear communication and delivery with a business mindset.

bio.suffix: . I combine strategy, design, and code to deliver practical impact: stronger digital authority, better user experience, and more business opportunities.

telegas.title: TeleGás Monte Verde
telegas.subtitle: Commercial Landing Page
telegas.description: I built a strategic landing page for a gas distributor in Betim-MG with a clear conversion focus. The project combines local SEO, action-driven copy, and fast contact paths to improve lead generation.

togyro.title: Togyro Group Victory
togyro.subtitle: Corporate Portfolio
togyro.description: I created an institutional website with a futuristic visual identity for a technology company. It blends smooth motion, responsive UX, and scalable architecture to reinforce digital brand authority.

togyrodelivery.title: Togyro Delivery AI
togyrodelivery.subtitle: AI Delivery Platform
togyrodelivery.description: I built a delivery platform with an AI agent to support restaurant operations and automate sales interactions. The product includes WhatsApp broadcast flows to increase conversion and speed up ordering.

kypy.title: Kypy Health
kypy.subtitle: Clinic Landing Page
kypy.description: I structured Kypy clinic's digital presence with a strong focus on service clarity and trust. The solution improves user flow, highlights treatments, and strengthens conversion opportunities.

ecosempre.title: EcoSempre Project
ecosempre.subtitle: Environmental Platform
ecosempre.description: I built an educational platform about proper e-waste disposal with a didactic user experience. It combines interactive sections, practical guidance, and social-impact-oriented content architecture.

teamblack.title: TeamBlack
teamblack.subtitle: Educational Site
teamblack.description: I developed an institutional website for an educator with professional positioning and clear communication. It features course showcases, social proof, and integrated contact channels.

todolist.title: To-Do List
todolist.subtitle: Web Application
todolist.description: I built a productivity web app with full task CRUD and localStorage persistence. The product prioritizes usability, smooth interaction, and practical day-to-day organization.

gt.title: GT Personal Trainer
gt.subtitle: Fitness Site
gt.description: I created a commercial website for a personal trainer with clear value proposition, social proof, and strategic CTAs. The design was built to boost lead generation and personal brand strength.

phbytes.title: Ph Bytes
phbytes.subtitle: Technology Portfolio
phbytes.description: I developed an institutional website for a tech company with a positioning-first approach. Service architecture, portfolio storytelling, and contact flow were designed to attract qualified opportunities.

bodegueira.title: Bodegueira Charcutaria & Cia
bodegueira.subtitle: Food E-commerce
bodegueira.description: I developed a delivery e-commerce experience for Bodegueira in Brasília with a sales-first approach. The implementation includes product showcase, ordering flow, and WhatsApp integration to reduce friction.

lacos.title: Laços e Confeitos
lacos.subtitle: Confectionery Site
lacos.description: I developed a confectionery website with a premium visual identity and strong commercial intent. The experience highlights products, supports quote requests, and reinforces brand quality perception.

raha.title: Raha Health and Aesthetics
raha.subtitle: Clinic Site
raha.description: I built a health and aesthetics clinic website with strategic service communication and clean UX. The project enhances trust, brand positioning, and conversion through better contact pathways.

vivacqua.title: Vivacqua Dentistry
vivacqua.subtitle: Corporate Website
vivacqua.description: I developed a corporate dental website with a strong technical foundation. The solution combines semantic HTML, responsive design, accessibility, and performance best practices to improve visibility and credibility.

togyrostore.title: TogyroStore
togyrostore.subtitle: SaaS Platform
togyrostore.description: A Ruby on Rails SaaS platform that enables businesses to launch stores, landing pages, and delivery operations quickly. It was designed for scalable growth with centralized management.

devlab.footerNote: All examples are educational and focused on reuse, business impact and accessibility.

futuristic-button.name: Futuristic hover/focus button
futuristic-button.description: Reusable component with visible focus, good click area and clear visual states.
futuristic-button.a11y: Keeps visible focus and minimum 44px hit area.

project-card.name: Project card
project-card.description: Card structure with problem, solution, tech stack and case study CTA.
project-card.a11y: Uses semantic heading and descriptive link.

pricing-card.name: Pricing/SaaS card
pricing-card.description: Plan card with value and feature highlights.
pricing-card.a11y: Keeps clear hierarchy and keyboard-friendly action button.

whatsapp-cta.name: WhatsApp CTA
whatsapp-cta.description: Helper to generate contact links with prefilled message.

tech-badge.name: Tech badge
tech-badge.description: Simple badge to highlight stack and categories.

accessible-modal.name: Accessible modal
accessible-modal.description: Modal example with aria-modal, heading and Escape support.
accessible-modal.a11y: Includes focus control and keyboard dismissal.

toast-notification.name: Toast/notification
toast-notification.description: Quick feedback for copy actions and interaction status.

input-accessible-error.name: Input with accessible error
input-accessible-error.a11y: Connects error to field with aria-invalid and unique id.

strategy.name: Strategy Pattern
strategy.problem: Handles business rule variations without if/else explosion.
strategy.where: I apply it to coupons, discounts, shipping and payment logic.
strategy.summary: I use this pattern to extend rules safely with low coupling.

factory.name: Factory Pattern
factory.problem: Avoids repeated object creation with branching behavior.
factory.where: I apply it to layouts, AI agents and checkout methods.

adapter.name: Adapter Pattern
adapter.problem: Normalizes external APIs with different payload formats.
adapter.where: I apply it to Mercado Pago, delivery providers and WhatsApp APIs.
adapter.summary: Isolates external changes from internal domain logic.

observer.name: Observer Pattern
observer.problem: Syncs many listeners when one source state changes.
observer.where: I apply it to cart updates, notifications and real-time status.

repository.name: Repository Pattern
repository.problem: Separates domain logic from persistence concerns.
repository.where: I apply it to products, orders, users and tenant data.
repository.summary: Makes testing easier and infra swapping safer.

command.name: Command Pattern
command.problem: Encapsulates complex actions and execution pipelines.
command.where: I apply it to create order, cancel order, apply coupon and notify.

react-component.name: React component test
react-component.validation: Validates rendering with an accessible button name.
react-component.technicalExplanation: Ensures critical UI behavior remains stable across refactors.

accessible-form.name: Accessible form error test
accessible-form.validation: Checks aria-invalid and aria-describedby on invalid fields.
accessible-form.technicalExplanation: Guarantees accessibility behavior in submit flow.

api-create-product.name: Create product API test
api-create-product.validation: Validates resource creation with the correct tenant.
api-create-product.technicalExplanation: Prevents tenant data drift in multi-tenant environments.

tenant-isolation.name: Cross-tenant access prevention test
tenant-isolation.validation: Ensures tenant A cannot read tenant B data.
tenant-isolation.technicalExplanation: Shows maturity in security and domain boundaries.

currency-format.name: Currency formatting test
currency-format.validation: Validates BRL display format and separators.
currency-format.technicalExplanation: Avoids regressions in pricing and checkout display.

format-currency.name: formatCurrency for BRL
format-currency.whenToUse: Use in cards, checkout and financial dashboards.

create-whatsapp-link.name: createWhatsAppLink
create-whatsapp-link.description: Builds WhatsApp URL with normalized phone and message.
create-whatsapp-link.whenToUse: Use in contact forms and quick CTAs.

use-local-storage.name: useLocalStorage
use-local-storage.description: Hook to persist preferences in localStorage.
use-local-storage.whenToUse: Use for theme, language and profile mode.

zod-validation.name: Validation with Zod
zod-validation.description: Typed schema validation for form inputs.
zod-validation.whenToUse: Use to standardize front-end and back-end validation.

debounce.name: debounce
debounce.description: Delays execution to reduce repeated calls.
debounce.whenToUse: Use on search, autocomplete and filters.

slugify.name: slug generator
slugify.whenToUse: Use in CMS, blogs and dynamic pages.

class-helper.name: CSS class helper
class-helper.whenToUse: Use in components with many visual states.

api-error-handler.name: Basic API error handler
api-error-handler.description: Normalizes API error messages for consistent UX.
api-error-handler.whenToUse: Use in HTTP integrations with resilient fallback.

focus-visible.title: Visible focus
focus-visible.before: Keyboard navigation with weak focus indicator.
focus-visible.explanation: Visible focus supports keyboard and assistive users.

heading-structure.title: Proper heading structure
heading-structure.explanation: Improves screen reader navigation and SEO.

modal-accessible.title: Accessible modal
modal-accessible.before: Modal without focus control or Escape support.
modal-accessible.after: Dialog with aria-modal and keyboard dismissal.
modal-accessible.explanation: Prevents context loss for keyboard users.

aria-describedby.title: Field error with aria-describedby
aria-describedby.after: Input points to error message id.
aria-describedby.explanation: Screen readers announce error within field context.

button-accessible-name.title: Button with accessible name
button-accessible-name.explanation: Improves action discoverability for assistive tech.

color-contrast.title: Adequate contrast
color-contrast.explanation: Supports readability across displays and conditions.

keyboard-navigation.title: Keyboard navigation
keyboard-navigation.after: Full interaction available with tab, enter and escape.
keyboard-navigation.explanation: Allows complete operation without pointer input.
keyboard-navigation.code: button, a and inputs in logical tab order

image-alt.title: Image alternative text
image-alt.explanation: Improves screen reader interpretation and indexing.

reduced-motion.title: Respect prefers-reduced-motion
reduced-motion.after: Motion reduced when user preference is enabled.
reduced-motion.explanation: Reduces vestibular discomfort and boosts performance.

landing-ai-agent.decisions: Simple entry flow to reduce conversion friction.
landing-ai-agent.problemsSolved: Faster first response and lead qualification.

saas-multitenant.name: Multi-tenant SaaS
saas-multitenant.diagram: Tenant -> Frontend -> API -> DB isolated by tenantId
saas-multitenant.decisions: Tenant context authorization and strict data isolation.
saas-multitenant.problemsSolved: Security and scale across multiple clients.

finalCta.subtitle: I can help you build a more professional digital presence with landing pages, web systems, online stores, automations and virtual agents.

togyro-delivery.title: Case Study: Togyro Delivery AI
togyro-delivery.problem: Restaurants lost orders due to fragmented channels and slow response.
togyro-delivery.solution: Centralized platform with AI-assisted flow and automated messaging.
togyro-delivery.decisions: Event-driven architecture with domain boundaries and clear contracts.
togyro-delivery.differentials: WhatsApp integration and conversion-first mobile flow.
togyro-delivery.learnings: Continuous validation of business rules improves operational predictability.
togyro-delivery.nextSteps: Expand observability and load tests for peak traffic windows.

vivacqua.title: Case Study: Vivacqua Dentistry
vivacqua.problem: Digital presence lacked clarity and organic visibility.
vivacqua.solution: Technical website with SEO, accessibility and streamlined contact flow.
vivacqua.decisions: Semantic HTML, optimized assets and conversion-oriented structure.
vivacqua.differentials: Strong focus on performance and brand credibility.
vivacqua.learnings: Solid technical SEO improves acquisition with lower media dependency.
vivacqua.nextSteps: Expand service-specific pages and funnel analytics.

bodegueira.title: Case Study: Bodegueira
bodegueira.problem: Sales process was fragmented and difficult to scale.
bodegueira.solution: Lean e-commerce flow with direct WhatsApp order integration.
bodegueira.decisions: Short checkout to reduce abandonment on mobile devices.
bodegueira.differentials: Fast buying journey optimized for conversion.
bodegueira.learnings: Clear offers and direct CTAs increase close rate.
bodegueira.nextSteps: Add metric dashboard and cart recovery flow.

lacos-e-confeitos.title: Case Study: Laços e Confeitos
lacos-e-confeitos.problem: Craft brand had limited digital showcase and unstable demand flow.
lacos-e-confeitos.solution: Premium visual website focused on catalog and quote request.
lacos-e-confeitos.decisions: Visual storytelling prioritized with objective quote CTA.
lacos-e-confeitos.differentials: Premium identity with responsive, conversion-aware UX.
lacos-e-confeitos.learnings: Commercially intentional design improves trust and repeat demand.
lacos-e-confeitos.nextSteps: Add online ordering and automated follow-up.

togyro-group-victory.title: Case Study: Togyro Group Victory
togyro-group-victory.problem: Need for premium digital positioning for a tech company.
togyro-group-victory.solution: Institutional site with futuristic identity and authority narrative.
togyro-group-victory.decisions: Performance-aware motion and scalable component structure.
togyro-group-victory.differentials: Distinct visual language with strong branding impact.
togyro-group-victory.learnings: Visual consistency accelerates perceived brand value.
togyro-group-victory.nextSteps: Expand to service-specific pages with lead scoring.
